task:
Configure OBS Studio streaming output for Twitch as follows:
- Stream Service: Twitch (stream key may be empty or any placeholder)
- Output mode: Advanced
- Streaming Encoder: x264 (software)
- Rate Control: CBR
- Bitrate: 6000 kbps
- Keyframe Interval: 2 seconds
- x264 Preset (CPU Usage Preset): veryfast
- Profile: high

Persist the changes so basic.ini and service.json are written.

verification.description: Advanced output track index is set

verification.eval: any(int(str(v).split()[0]) == 6000 for v in (result.get('ini_AdvOut', {}) or {}).values() if str(v).strip().split() and str(v).split()[0].isdigit())
verification.description: Streaming bitrate = 6000 kbps present in AdvOut

verification.eval: any('veryfast' in str(v).lower() for v in (result.get('ini_AdvOut', {}) or {}).values())
